chapter_title.en: Chapter on Good Care for Animals

text: 2478 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَا اِشْتَرَى أَحَدٌ دَابَّةً إِلاَّ قَالَتْ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِجْعَلْهُ بِي رَحِيماً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2478 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"No one purchases an animal except that it says: 'O Allah (swt), make him merciful to me.'"
